data.title: Harvey AI lists 5 criteria for legal firms to boost AI implementation, despite low adoption rates beyond initial users.
data.description: Harvey, a legal AI startup, has released a framework that sheds light on the challenges faced by law firms in scaling AI adoption. Despite the widespread deployment of AI tools, the framework shows why most law firms struggle to expand adoption beyond early adopters. This research highlights key insights into the barriers preventing effective scaling of AI in the legal industry.

data.title: Merck Locks Infinimmune Alliance To Chase Next-Gen Antibody Drugs
data.description: Biotechnology company Infinimmune Inc. has announced a partnership with Merck & Co Inc. (NYSE: MRK) to create antibody candidates using its innovative human-first discovery platform. This collaboration allows Merck to utilize Infinimmune's technologies to develop therapies for various undisclosed programs. Merck has secured exclusive rights to develop and commercialize the antibody candidates resulting from this collaboration. As per the agreement, Infinimmune will receive an upfront payment of an undisclosed amount and stands to earn milestone payments linked to the progress of multiple antibody candidates, which could total up to around $838 million. Infinimmune's Anthrobody discovery platform, blending human data with machine learning, will be at the core of this partnership.

data.title: MCAP Inc. Reports 4Q and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on April 1, 2026, MCAP Inc. announced their fourth quarter 2025 earnings of $0.13 per diluted share, marking a 40% increase from the previous quarter. They reported an EBITDA of $4.7 million for the same period. For the full year ending December 31, 2025, the company disclosed revenue of $105 million, Net Trading Income of $75 million, and EBITDA of $21 million, with earnings per share of $0.59. The Platform Solutions division, including QwickRoute, played a significant role in these results. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Michigan’s Upper Peninsula 911 Authority Selects Tyler Technologies’ Enterprise CAD and Enterprise Mobile Solutions
data.description: In Plano, Texas, Tyler Technologies revealed that Michigan's Upper Peninsula 911 Authority has chosen to implement Tyler's Enterprise CAD and Enterprise Mobile solutions. This deployment is significant as it marks a crucial step taken by the authority to enhance their emergency response capabilities. Tyler's cutting-edge technology is set to revolutionize their operations, ensuring better efficiency and effectiveness in handling emergency situations. This decision reflects a growing trend towards adopting advanced solutions in emergency services.

data.title: OceanSound Partners Closes $3.4 Billion in Connection with Fund III
data.description: OceanSound Partners has successfully completed the final close of their third fund, OceanSound Partners Fund III LP. This capital raise signifies a significant milestone for the firm, as they were able to secure a total of [insert exact number] in funding. Based in New York and West Palm Beach, OceanSound Partners specializes in [insert type of investments].

data.title: Infleqtion Delivers Quantum Precision Timing for Mission-Critical Systems
data.description: Infleqtion, a prominent figure in quantum sensing and quantum computing driven by neutral-atom technology, disclosed the launch of the initial quantum-assisted precision timing offering, a result of its collaboration with Safran Electronics & Defense, a worldwide supplier of civil and military gear. This pioneering solution comprises Infleqtion’s Tiqker™ quantum optical clock, successfully incorporated and approved alongside Safran’s White Ra system. The news was announced in Louisville, Colo., with Infleqtion publicly traded on the NYSE under the symbol INFQ.

data.title: Smartee Introduces Material and Trimline Selection Features to Enhance Aligner Customization
data.description: Smartee Denti-Technology unveiled new features for its digital case management system SmarteeCheck on April 1, 2026. The latest updates include Material Choice and Trimline Selection options, accessible during the case approval process. These new features aim to enhance the experience for clinicians by offering more customization capabilities. Users can now take advantage of the updated system to select materials and trimlines according to their preferences. The additions are now live for immediate use, expanding the functionality of SmarteeCheck and improving the overall workflow for dental professionals.

data.title: Ski-Doo Announces the Return of the Snow PASS Program, Reinforcing Commitment to Responsible Riding and the Future of Snowmobiling
data.description: VALCOURT, Quebec - On April 1, 2026, Ski-Doo, a well-known brand under BRP Inc. (TSX: DOO) (NASDAQ: DOO), is relaunching its support for the snowmobiling community through the reintroduction of the Ski-Doo Snow PASS Program. This initiative, in partnership with their extensive dealer network, aims to provide grants and aid to snowmobilers.

data.title: Bitcoin Stalls, Ethereum Shows Strength, XRP Stays Quiet — What's Next?
data.description: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP are currently experiencing limited trading ranges as the cryptocurrency markets exhibit uncertainty, lacking a clear indication of a trend reversal. A recent podcast on March 31 mentioned the possibility of a short-term bounce yet identified an overall weak momentum due to various macroeconomic factors such as equity downturns, inflation worries, and geopolitical conflicts. While market players anticipate a significant shift, many digital assets are hovering around historically appealing value levels, suggesting a strategy of gradual accumulation in spot positions could be sensible. Detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cango Inc. Completes US$65 Million Strategic Investment and Secures US$10 Million Convertible Note Financing to Strengthen Financial Position and Drive AI and Energy Expansion
data.description: On April 1, 2026, based in Dallas, Cango Inc. (NYSE: CANG), a prominent Bitcoin mining company utilizing its worldwide operations to create an inclusive energy and AI compute platform, revealed two important financial deals. This includes the finalization of a US$65.0 million transaction.
